creator: dcs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: dcs->sos

At the time the stable branch was still 3.x, no consensus could be 
reached in this matter. Nowadays, fresh installations of 3.x are 
not supported any longer, so the matter is kind of moot as far as 
wd.c is concerned (though an eventual fix could eventually be 
backported). 

On the 4.x branch and on, we use a new driver to support ATA devices, 
one which is being actively maintained. Since the problem is present 
in this new driver too, the PR is thus transfered to it's maintainer.
